$schema_note: Canonical pointer to where the build is. Re-derive context from this + blackboard files; do not scroll chat history.

project.tagline: Mission control for a swarm of CLI coding agents: calm surface, swarming depth. Parallel CLI-agent orchestration over isolated git worktrees — cross-platform, self-hosted, OSS.
project._prior_art_internal: prior-art parallel-agent orchestrator; provenance URL + rationale recorded in DECISIONS.md (ADR-0020) and docs/recon.md

phase_status.2_host_engine: done (v0.3.0; CI run 27536255083 GREEN 3 OSes; Critic review-3 PASS; P01/P02/P03/P04/P07/P10/P11 proven incl Windows; no quarantines)
phase_status.3_desktop_client: done (v0.4.0; CI run 27550630185 GREEN 3 OSes [verify matrix] + e2e (desktop) job; independent Critic ALL-PASS incl §6.3; axe a11y 0 critical/serious; perf budgets recorded; P05/P06/P08/P09 = Done. Billing unblocked by making repo public — ADR-0012.)
phase_status.4_mobile_client: done (v0.5.0; CI run 27567194903 GREEN 3 OSes [verify] + e2e (desktop) + e2e (mobile); independent Phase-4 Critic ALL-PASS incl §6.3; axe a11y 0 critical/serious; phone perf budgets PASS; P12 done. PWA pairing [QR single-use code -> bearer in IndexedDB], read journeys, touch terminal+dispatch, offline SW + Web Push/VAPID. On-device push lights up at the Phase-5 secure origin.)
phase_status.5_platform_setup: done (v0.6.0; CI run 27579893046 GREEN — verify x3 + e2e desktop+mobile + new package x3 [electron-builder --dir cold on all 3 OS]; independent Phase-5 Critic ALL-PASS. grove up/start/stop/status lifecycle (P13); cloudflared remote tunnel-URL pairing -> on-device SW+push (Caddy-TLS secure-context proof); electron-builder NSIS/dmg/AppImage; real 97.6MB NSIS installer + packaged GUI launch evidence (P14). Linear P13/P14 Done.)
phase_status.6_hardening_launch: done (v1.0.0 — the FINAL release; CI run 27626509741 GREEN 3 OSes [verify x3 + e2e desktop + e2e mobile + package x3]; independent Phase-6 Critic ALL-PASS [evidence/phase-6/review.md]. a11y SOURCE fixes in @swarm/ui [token AA on raised+overlay, Dialog/Sheet closed=display:none, TerminalFrame showFind/showSplit; axe 0/0 desktop+mobile, CI 27623871151] + license-audit [OSS-only, 0 GPL/proprietary] + cross-platform perf [Linux budgets PASS; terminal-stream p95 611ms Windows -> 43ms Linux] + security review [no High/Critical] + docs + MIT LICENSE + real grove bin + HANDOFF.md. All 14 parity P01-P14 shipped. ADR-0018/0019.)

next_release_target: shipped — v1.0.0 is the FINAL release (all §9 exit conditions met with evidence)

stack_decision.db: PGlite (embedded Postgres, WASM) via Drizzle ORM; real Postgres optional
stack_decision.sync: self-hosted WebSocket + PGlite-backed append-only event log + resume tokens
stack_decision.pty: @homebridge/node-pty-prebuilt-multiarch (ConPTY on Windows; prebuilds win/mac/linux incl Node24 ABI, no compiler) — VALIDATED ADR-0007a; PTY layer/host engine runs under NODE not Bun (Bun tears down ConPTY net.Socket on Windows); tree-kill verified killing process trees
stack_decision.mobile: PWA-first (service worker, Web Push/VAPID); Capacitor optional/deferred

next_actions: [v1.0.0 SHIPPED 2026-06-16 — PROJECT COMPLETE] Phase 6 done: a11y SOURCE fixes (CI 27623871151) + license-audit (OSS-only) + cross-platform perf (Linux budgets PASS) + security review (no High/Critical) + docs + MIT LICENSE + real grove bin; independent Phase-6 Critic ALL-PASS (evidence/phase-6/review.md); v1.0.0 cut on CI 27626509741 (GREEN 3 OSes) + tag v1.0.0 + HANDOFF.md. All 14 parity items P01-P14 shipped across v0.1.0-v1.0.0. See HANDOFF.md.

[post-1.0 backlog, optional] publish a `grove` bin to a registry (npx grove); acquire a code-signing cert (unsigned installers); bump dev-only esbuild advisories; macOS perf datapoint to complement the Linux re-measure.

[harness retro follow-up, at a clean boundary] route the CI-gate lessons (turbo-cache false-green -> --force; --force != CI -> clean-install gate; gate the test step at DEFAULT-or-capped concurrency not --concurrency=1; billing-misdiagnosis rule; re-gate AFTER adding evidence/QA specs) into recursive-harness artifacts via /retro -> /harness-pr
